_note: FROZEN baseline pass-map for the L5 regression gate (BUILD_19_SPEC). A regression = a probe TRUE here and FALSE in the current run. Bumped only DELIBERATELY (run-battery.ps1 -Freeze, or by hand) -- an auto-refresh would let a regression silently become the new normal. The L5 set = battery-l5.json (autonomy family, live-confirmed 6/6 on 2026-06-14 Build-26.1) + battery-m3-armed.json (generation/novelty/survivor/scaffold lanes, established-passing through Build-18). Re-run -Freeze only on a confirmed-clean run.
